main.description: Add or replace one recipient wrap in an envelope manifest. This endpoint requires operator authorization. The ciphertext CID remains unchanged and a new rotatable manifest CID is returned. Deleted input manifests are reported as gone when a cleanup tombstone is retained.

manifest_cid.description: CID of the current envelope manifest.

ct_cid.description: Optional expected ciphertext CID. If present, it must match the manifest before the grant is applied.

from_recipient.description: Visible-ASCII existing recipient whose wrap authorizes unwrapping the DEK. Defaults to the node operator DID.

to_recipient.description: Visible-ASCII recipient DID or key id to add or replace in the new manifest.

ct_cid.description: Stable ciphertext CID referenced by both manifests.

old_manifest_cid.description: CID of the manifest used as the grant input.

manifest_cid.description: CID of the new envelope manifest after adding the recipient wrap.

recipients.description: Recipient ids currently present in the new manifest.
